text:
The paper exists and has been verified. The authors in the reference metadata include "Dong Lao," who does not appear in the actual author list. The real author list (per arXiv, OpenReview, and the author's homepage) is: Daniel Wang, Patrick Rim, Tian Tian, Alex Wong, and Ganesh Sundaramoorthi — five authors, not six. However, the cited reference also omits "Dong Lao" from the arXiv listing. The venue is confirmed as ICLR 2026 (The Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations), and the core authors (Daniel Wang, Patrick Rim, Tian Tian, Alex Wong, Ganesh Sundaramoorthi) substantially match. "Dong Lao" appears to be an extra name that doesn't belong, but the majority of cited authors are correct and the paper is definitively real.

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists on arXiv (arXiv:2506.05480) and OpenReview, confirmed as accepted at ICLR 2026. The cited authors (Daniel Wang, Patrick Rim, Tian Tian, Alex Wong, Ganesh Sundaramoorthi) substantially match the real authors; "Dong Lao" appears to be an extra name not in the actual author list but does not invalidate the reference given the otherwise strong match.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.05480
